description: A slogan graphic over a vintage-Americana color photograph. The photo shows a 1970s-era roadside scene: a black full-size American sedan (Cadillac-style) parked at a corner beside a tall illuminated marquee sign reading 'English's FAMILY RESTAURANT' with a changeable-letter board listing 'CHICKEN HAM SHRIMP / 2 VE / BUTTER AND BISCUIT 4.95' and a rooster emblem, with a small-town intersection, water tower, and traffic lights in the background. At the top center are two agency logos: the U.S. Department of Labor seal and the red and blue 'SBA' (Small Business Administration) wordmark. Bold navy text reads 'SMALL BUSINESS WEEK:' over italic 'The American Dream at Work'.
notable_text: SMALL BUSINESS WEEK: The American Dream at Work; English's FAMILY RESTAURANT
